name: @metric-im/wfmu
title: WFMU Radio
description: Browse and play WFMU archives and live streams on Sonos

tools.name: wfmu_speakers
tools.description: List available Sonos speakers on the local network. Returns names and IPs.

tools.name: wfmu_shows
tools.description: List WFMU show codes and names. Use this to find the show code before looking up episodes.

tools.name: wfmu_episodes
tools.description: List recent episodes for a WFMU show by its two-letter code. Use wfmu_shows first to find the code.

code.description: Two-letter show code (e.g. MR for Wake)

tools.name: wfmu_play
tools.description: Play a WFMU episode or any audio URL on a Sonos speaker.

tools.name: wfmu_live
tools.description: Play a live WFMU stream on a Sonos speaker. Streams: freeform, rock, drummer, sheena.

stream.description: Stream name: freeform (default), rock, drummer, or sheena

tools.name: wfmu_now_playing
tools.description: Check what is currently playing on a Sonos speaker.

speaker.description: Sonos speaker name (uses first speaker if omitted)

tools.name: wfmu_playback
tools.description: Control Sonos playback: play, pause, stop, next, or previous.

action.description: Action: play, pause, stop, next, or previous

tools.name: wfmu_volume
tools.description: Set the volume on a Sonos speaker (0-100).
